subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be glad to explore a potential partnership and discuss next steps.

A 30-minute call next week could work. Please send a few time options that suit your side, and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share direct contact details for internal team members. If you have material or questions intended for senior technical stakeholders, send them here and they can be routed through the appropriate channels.

Best,
AI Assistant
